app.footer: Vigilyx v0.9.1 — Email Traffic Monitoring System

auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your username and password.
auth.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
auth.subtitleCn: Email Security · Intelligent Analysis · Real-time Protection
auth.defaultPasswordDetected: Default password detected. Please change it immediately.
auth.passwordMismatchHint: Passwords do not match. Please re-enter.
auth.newPasswordSameAsOld: New password cannot be the same as the default password

setup.welcomeText: Vigilyx is an intelligent email security analysis platform built for enterprises. It integrates real-time traffic monitoring, multi-dimensional threat detection engines, automated response and security orchestration capabilities to help security teams quickly identify and respond to email threats.
setup.welcomeHint: These settings can be changed anytime in Settings
setup.deployModeLead: Choose the deployment method that fits your network environment:
setup.mtaDesc: Vigilyx acts as an SMTP relay, intercepting the mail delivery chain to block/quarantine malicious emails in real time before delivery.
setup.mirrorDesc: Captures email traffic via network mirror port without affecting the existing mail chain. Ideal for initial deployment and evaluation.
setup.flowTopologyDemo: ▼ MTA Gateway Mode — Mail Flow Topology
setup.flowEmailSessionDesc: EHLO → MAIL FROM → RCPT TO → DATA
setup.networkMtaNote: In MTA mode, Vigilyx acts as an SMTP relay. Email clients connect directly to the Vigilyx listen address.
setup.networkEnvNote: These port settings are used to identify mail protocols in mirrored traffic, not listening ports.
setup.downstreamMtaHint: Forward to this address after inspection (e.g. Exchange/Postfix)
setup.noEncryptionWarning: ⚠️ Plaintext mode is only recommended in trusted LAN environments
setup.webmailServersHint: Comma-separated, used to identify webmail traffic in HTTP flows
setup.domainsSubtitle: Configure internal domains (used to distinguish internal/external email)
setup.internalDomainsTip: Internal domains help the engine distinguish internal vs. external email for more accurate threat assessment.
setup.snifferInterfaceHint: Select the network interface for mirror traffic capture
setup.snifferSkipTip: If unsure which interface to select, you can skip this step and configure it later in Settings.
setup.smtpNoAuthNote: Leave empty for no-auth mode (supported by some LAN SMTP servers)
setup.securityGuide: Security note: Use STARTTLS or TLS encryption for alert emails
setup.aiModelNote: The AI model takes 5-10 minutes to download on first load (~550 MB)
setup.aiDisabledTip: The AI service is optional. The engine can still detect threats using rules and threat intelligence without it.
setup.plaintextSmtpLock: Plaintext SMTP is selected. To use it, first enable "Allow plaintext SMTP (admin override)"; this setting is persisted.
setup.noAuthMechanism: The SMTP server does not offer a compatible AUTH mechanism. If the server allows unauthenticated LAN relay, leave username and password empty and try again.
setup.smtpCredentialsBothOrNone: SMTP username and password must either both be provided or both be left empty.

notify.trafficAlertBody: Current email arrival rate: {{rate}}/min, exceeding threshold {{threshold}}

networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

password.policyHint: At least 12 characters; 12-15 chars require at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, digits, symbols; 16+ chars require at least 2; no all-whitespace or common weak passwords.
password.noWhitespaceOnly: Password cannot consist of whitespace only
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters
password.tooCommon: Password is too common or follows a simple pattern. Please use a stronger password.
password.needTwoClasses: Password must contain at least 2 character classes
password.needThreeClasses: Passwords of 12-15 characters must include at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, digits, symbols

dashboard.noMediumAboveEvents: No medium or above security events

logs.title: Logs
logs.loadFailedHint: Please check your network connection or try again later
logs.emptyHint: Logs will appear automatically after mail transmission completes

quarantine.title: Email Quarantine
quarantine.mirrorModeDesc: In mirror mode, the system passively monitors email traffic via network capture and cannot intercept or quarantine emails. Switch to MTA Proxy Mode to deploy as an SMTP relay, enabling real-time detection and interception of malicious emails with quarantine management.
quarantine.goToSettings: Go to Settings to Switch to MTA Mode
quarantine.confirmRelease: Are you sure you want to release this email? It will be forwarded to the recipient.
quarantine.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this quarantined email? This action cannot be undone.

community.ossRoadmapReleaseItem1: Convergence Circuit Breaker & Multi-Signal Fusion Tuning
community.ossRoadmapReleaseItem3: Zero-Width Character / HTML Entity Encoding Defense
community.ossRoadmapIntelItem1: Community IOC Intel Subscribe / Publish API
community.finCharityItem1: Supporting Vulnerable Groups & Families in Need
community.intelFeedIocDesc: Community-built email threat IOC feed including malicious senders, phishing domains, malicious IPs, and more
community.intelFeedYaraDesc: Community-contributed YARA detection rules, updated weekly, covering latest malware families and phishing techniques
community.intelFeedSamplesDesc: Anonymized phishing email samples for security research and model training
community.intelFeedReportsDesc: Email threat analysis reports and incident response guides written by community security researchers
community.heroDesc1: Building an open, collaborative, and shared email security defense ecosystem.
community.heroDesc2: Enabling every organization to access enterprise-grade email threat detection.
community.missionEquityDesc: Email security should not be exclusive to large enterprises. We fully open-source our 20-module detection pipeline, DS-Murphy fusion algorithm, and AI-assisted analysis, enabling small and medium organizations to deploy enterprise-grade email threat detection.
community.missionCollabDesc: Single-point defense is never enough. Through community IOC intelligence sharing, YARA rule marketplace, and threat sample exchange, we build a collective immunity network — when one node detects a threat, all nodes synchronize defenses.
community.missionTransDesc: Security product code should be auditable. We fully disclose detection logic, fusion algorithms, and verdict thresholds, making every security decision traceable, explainable, and verifiable.
community.missionEvolveDesc: Threats evolve, and so must defenses. Community-driven YARA rule updates, NLP model iterations, and new attack technique detection ensure our defensive capabilities keep pace with attackers.
community.ctaGithubDesc: Star, Fork, Issue, PR — Everything starts here
community.ctaGiteeDesc: Accelerated access in China, synced updates
community.finNotice: We are committed to giving back the vast majority of funds received to society. Below is our funding allocation plan — all details are transparent and auditable.
community.finFooter: Funding details will be publicly displayed on this page, open to community oversight and audit.
community.intelIntroDesc: Community-driven intelligence exchange: when one node detects a threat, all nodes synchronize defenses. Following the TLP (Traffic Light Protocol) standard to protect sensitive information.
community.tlpRedDesc: Restricted to specific recipients only, no forwarding
community.tlpAmberDesc: Limited to organization and necessary partners

automation.title: Security Orchestration & Automated Response
automation.subtitle: Configure automated disposition rules, email alerts, and WeChat notifications
automation.leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep current value
automation.secretConfiguredPlaceholder: Configured (enter a new value to rotate)
automation.secretConfiguredHint: Leave the current secret unchanged to keep it, or clear it and save to remove it
automation.confirmDeleteRule: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?

error.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
error.plaintextSmtpLocked: Plaintext SMTP is selected. To use it, first enable "Allow plaintext SMTP (admin override)".
error.smtpNoAuth: The SMTP server does not support AUTH. If it allows unauthenticated LAN relay, leave username and password empty and retry.
error.smtpCredentialsPair: SMTP username and password must either both be provided or both be left empty.
error.checkNetwork: Please check your network connection and refresh the page
error.webhookUrlRequired: Webhook action is enabled but the callback URL is empty.
error.noActionSelected: Please select at least one action.
error.advancedConditionMustBeObject: In advanced mode, conditions must be a JSON object.
error.advancedActionMustBeArray: In advanced mode, actions must be a JSON array.
error.advancedJsonInvalid: Invalid JSON format in advanced mode.
error.ruleConditionAbnormal: Rule "{{name}}" has malformed conditions and cannot be updated. Please edit and fix it first.
error.ruleActionAbnormal: Rule "{{name}}" has malformed actions and cannot be updated. Please edit and fix it first.

email.title: Email Alert Notifications
email.description: Configure SMTP server to send email alerts when threats are detected
email.channelOnlyHint: This page only configures the email channel. Actual sending is triggered by rules containing the {{actionCode}} action on the Disposition Rules tab.
email.plaintextHint: Plaintext connections are not recommended as they may expose credentials. Use STARTTLS or TLS instead.
email.credentialsHint: If the SMTP server allows unauthenticated sending (LAN scenario), leave both username and password empty.
email.testSent: Test email sent. Please check your inbox.

wechat.title: WeChat Work Alert
wechat.description: Configure a WeChat Work group bot to push alert messages when threats are detected
wechat.channelOnlyHint: This page only configures the WeChat channel. Actual sending is triggered by rules containing the {{actionCode}} action on the Disposition Rules tab.
wechat.encryptHint: The Webhook URL is stored encrypted.
wechat.mobilePlaceholder: One mobile number per line, used to @ specific group members
wechat.mobileHint: When filled, alert messages will @ the corresponding group members.
wechat.testSent: Test message sent. Please check your WeChat Work group.

form.categoriesPlaceholder:
One category per line, e.g.:
phishing
malware
form.modulesPlaceholder:
One module per line, e.g.:
content_analysis
link_scan
form.emailTemplatePlaceholder: Optional, leave blank to use default template
form.wechatTemplatePlaceholder: Optional, leave blank to use default template
form.wechatRuleMobilesPlaceholder: One mobile per line, overrides channel-level config
form.webhookHeadersPlaceholder:
One Key: Value pair per line
e.g. Authorization: Bearer xxx

rules.introText: Select a preset template to quickly create common alert rules, or start from scratch.
rules.priorityHint: Lower priority numbers are matched first. Recommended range: 10-1000.
rules.advancedHint: In advanced mode, edit JSON directly. Conditions must be an object, actions must be an array. Ensure valid format.
rules.directionHint: Leave empty to match all directions
rules.categoriesHint: Leave empty to match all categories
rules.modulesHint: Leave empty to match all modules
rules.ruleMobilesHint: This config applies only to this rule, overriding channel-level @ settings.
rules.headersHint: One Key: Value header pair per line.
rules.noRulesHint: Click "New Rule" or select a preset template to get started

action.wechatAlertDesc: Push to WeChat Work group bot

unsupported.conditionNotVisual: The current rule conditions cannot be converted to a visual form. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.actionFormatError: The current rule actions have an invalid format. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.actionNotVisual: The current rule actions cannot be converted to a visual form. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.multipleEmailTemplates: The current rule contains multiple different email templates. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.wechatWebhookOverride: The current rule uses a custom WeChat Webhook override. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.multipleWechatTemplates: The current rule contains multiple different WeChat message templates. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.multipleWechatMobiles: The current rule contains multiple different WeChat @ mobile configs. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.webhookMissingUrl: The current rule's Webhook action is missing a URL. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.multipleWebhookUrls: The current rule contains multiple different Webhook URLs. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.multipleWebhookHeaders: The current rule contains multiple different sets of Webhook headers. Switched to advanced JSON mode.
unsupported.unknownActionType: The current rule contains an unsupported action type "{{actionType}}". Switched to advanced JSON mode.

preset.mediumEmailDesc: Matches Medium and above threats, sends email alert.
preset.highWechatDesc: Matches High and above threats, sends WeChat Work alert.
preset.inboundHighWechatDesc: Only inbound High and above threats trigger WeChat Work alert.
preset.criticalDualBrief: Critical triggers both email and WeChat
preset.criticalDualDesc: Matches Critical threats, sends both email and WeChat Work alerts.

dataSecurity.privacyOnHint: Privacy protection enabled, sensitive information is masked
dataSecurity.privacyOffHint: Privacy protection disabled, showing full information
dataSecurity.privacyEnabledFileDisabled: File download is disabled in privacy protection mode
dataSecurity.systemNormal: System running normally, no security incidents
dataSecurity.incidentTypeDesc_draft_box_abuse: Using webmail draft box to stage sensitive data, bypassing outbound detection
dataSecurity.incidentTypeDesc_file_transit_abuse: Exfiltrating sensitive data via file transfer or cloud storage upload
dataSecurity.incidentTypeDesc_self_sending: Sending emails with sensitive data to one's own external mailbox
dataSecurity.incidentTypeDesc_jrt_compliance_violatio: Triggered JR/T 0197-2020 financial data classification compliance threshold
dataSecurity.policySubtitle: Real-time compliance detection for outbound data based on JR/T 0197-2020 Financial Data Security Classification Guide
dataSecurity.c3DescFull: Personal identity, financial accounts, property & sensitive association info
dataSecurity.draftBoxRiskDesc: Using webmail draft box to stage sensitive data, bypassing outbound detection
dataSecurity.draftBoxTrigger: User saves/edits content with C3+ sensitive fields in draft box
dataSecurity.fileTransitRiskDesc: Exfiltrating sensitive files via file transfer/cloud storage upload
dataSecurity.fileTransitTrigger: Sensitive file detected being uploaded via file transfer service
dataSecurity.fileTransitOutput: Generate security incident + file fingerprint record
dataSecurity.selfSendRiskDesc: Sending emails with sensitive data to one's own external mailbox
dataSecurity.selfSendTrigger: Sender and recipient are different mailboxes of the same user
dataSecurity.selfSendOutput: Generate security incident + associated email record
dataSecurity.offHoursWeightingDesc: Automatically elevate severity for off-hours operations
dataSecurity.offHoursWeightingDescData: Data security incidents during off-hours are automatically elevated in severity
dataSecurity.offHoursWeightingPolicyDesc: Incidents triggered during off-hours are automatically elevated by one severity level
dataSecurity.batchAnomalyDesc: Elevate severity based on frequency when a user triggers multiple incidents in a short period
dataSecurity.selectIncident: Select an incident to view details
dataSecurity.clickIncidentHint: Click an incident card on the left to view detailed analysis
dataSecurity.exportRedactedCopy: Export a redacted copy for security review
dataSecurity.httpTrafficCaptureDesc: Configure webmail server IPs and HTTP listening ports for sniffer traffic capture
dataSecurity.saveWillRestartSniffer: Saving will restart the sniffer service
dataSecurity.severityBoostHint: When enabled, off-hours security incidents will be automatically elevated by one severity level
dataSecurity.startBeforeEnd: Start time must be before end time
dataSecurity.syslogForwardingDesc: Forward data security incidents to SIEM/SOC platforms
dataSecurity.syslogForwardingDescRestart: Forward data security incidents via Syslog to SIEM/SOC (effective after saving)
dataSecurity.syslogSavedRestart: Syslog configuration saved, forwarding service is restarting...

knowledge.heroDesc: Understand Vigilyx platform architecture, detection engines, threat intelligence, data security, and automated response workflows
knowledge.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or browse all articles

emailHtml.sanitizedEmpty: [Content sanitized] The email HTML content is empty after security filtering

emailSecurity.title: Email Security
emailSecurity.loadFailed: Failed to load data, please try again later
emailSecurity.moduleDescContentScan: Scans email text for phishing keywords, social engineering, and suspicious patterns
emailSecurity.moduleDescHtmlScan: Analyzes HTML structure to detect hidden text, pixel tracking, and CSS spoofing
emailSecurity.moduleDescAttachScan: Inspects attachment type, size, and filename to identify suspicious files
emailSecurity.moduleDescAttachContent: Deep analysis of attachment content for macros, scripts, and executable code
emailSecurity.moduleDescAttachHash: Computes attachment hashes and compares against known malware databases
emailSecurity.moduleDescMimeScan: Validates MIME structure compliance and detects encoding bypass attempts
emailSecurity.moduleDescHeaderScan: Analyzes email headers for forgery, SPF/DKIM/DMARC verification
emailSecurity.moduleDescLinkScan: Extracts and analyzes URLs in emails for suspicious link characteristics
emailSecurity.moduleDescLinkReputation: Queries URL/domain reputation databases to assess link safety
emailSecurity.moduleDescLinkContent: Deep analysis of link targets to detect redirects and disguises
emailSecurity.moduleDescAnomalyDetect: Detects abnormal sending patterns based on behavioral baseline models
emailSecurity.moduleDescSemanticScan: NLP semantic analysis to identify phishing intent and social engineering
emailSecurity.moduleDescDomainVerify: Verifies sender domain DNS records, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC configuration
emailSecurity.moduleDescIdentityAnomaly: Detects identity spoofing, first-contact analysis, and domain impersonation
emailSecurity.moduleDescTransactionCorrelation: Correlates multiple email transactions to discover coordinated attacks
emailSecurity.moduleDescAvEmlScan: Scans complete EML files using ClamAV engine for known malware
emailSecurity.moduleDescAvAttachScan: Scans individual attachments using ClamAV engine for known malware
emailSecurity.moduleDescYaraScan: Matches malicious patterns in emails and attachments using YARA rules
emailSecurity.moduleDescVerdict: Aggregates all module results via DS-Murphy fusion for final verdict
emailSecurity.engineDescSenderReputation: Evaluates sender domain reputation including DNS config, SPF/DKIM/DMARC
emailSecurity.engineDescContentAnalysis: Deep analysis of email text, HTML, and attachment content
emailSecurity.engineDescBehaviorBaseline: Detects abnormal sending patterns based on historical baselines
emailSecurity.engineDescUrlAnalysis: Analyzes safety and reputation of all URLs in the email
emailSecurity.engineDescProtocolCompliance: Verifies email protocol compliance including headers and MIME structure
emailSecurity.engineDescSemanticIntent: NLP semantic analysis to identify the true intent of the email
emailSecurity.engineDescIdentityAnomaly: Detects sender identity anomalies like first contact and domain impersonation
emailSecurity.engineDescTransactionCorrelation: Correlates multiple email transactions to discover coordinated attacks
emailSecurity.dsFusionDesc: Dempster-Shafer evidence theory fuses detection results from all engines
emailSecurity.convergenceBreakerDesc: Multiple independent modules flagged simultaneously, triggering convergence amplification
emailSecurity.noEmailsHint: Waiting for traffic capture or try expanding filter range
emailSecurity.noRestoredEmailsHint: Emails released from quarantine will appear here
emailSecurity.noBodyHint: Email body is still being parsed
emailSecurity.contentFallbackNotice: This hop did not fully recover the message body. Showing content from the original source session:
emailSecurity.sessionNotExist: Session does not exist or has been cleared
emailSecurity.encryptedEmailHint: This email uses encrypted transmission, content is protected in transit
emailSecurity.encryptedEmailNotDisplayed: Encrypted email content cannot be displayed
emailSecurity.encryptedNoBodyHint: TLS encrypted email body cannot be captured in mirror mode
emailSecurity.plaintextBanner: ⚠ This email was transmitted in plaintext without encryption
emailSecurity.tlsEncryptedBanner: ✓ This email was transmitted with TLS encryption
emailSecurity.confirmDeleteScene: Are you sure you want to delete this threat scene?
emailSecurity.feedbackQuestion: What do you think about this email?
emailSecurity.localIocDesc: Supports IP, domain, URL, email, hash, and subject indicator types
emailSecurity.intelWhitelistDesc: Whitelisted indicators will no longer trigger intel query alerts
emailSecurity.intelSourcesDesc: Configure external threat intelligence query sources
emailSecurity.otxDesc: Open-source threat intelligence platform for IP/domain/URL/hash reputation queries
emailSecurity.vtDesc: Multi-engine malware scanning platform for file and URL analysis
emailSecurity.abuseipdbDesc: IP address abuse report database providing IP reputation scores
emailSecurity.apiKeyClearHint: API key is configured; leave the field unchanged to keep it, or clear it and save to remove it
emailSecurity.aiServiceUrlHint: Usually a Docker internal address (e.g., http://ai:8900)
emailSecurity.maxTokensHint: Maximum token limit for text generation
emailSecurity.temperatureHint: Lower values are more conservative, higher values more creative
emailSecurity.attachVirusScanDesc: Scans email attachments for known malware using ClamAV engine
emailSecurity.emlVirusScanDesc: Scans complete EML email files for known malware using ClamAV engine
emailSecurity.confirmDeleteRule: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?
emailSecurity.bounceHarvestDesc: Detects attacks that probe valid email addresses through mass bounce messages
emailSecurity.internalDomainImpersonationDesc: Detect external senders using domains similar to internal domains (TLD swap, subdomain prefix, typosquatting, homoglyph)
emailSecurity.bulkMailingDesc: Detects mass email sending to many different recipients in a short time
emailSecurity.kwManageDesc: Manage keywords and patterns for email content detection rules
emailSecurity.clickCategoryCard: Click a category card for details
emailSecurity.selectCategoryToView: Select a category to view details

settings.soundEffectDesc: Play alert sound on new threats

capture.title: Traffic Capture
capture.subtitle: Network capture interface and rule settings
capture.autoRestoreDesc: Automatically restore last capture rules on restart

database.title: Database Management
database.subtitle: Data cleanup, auto-rotation and storage management
database.currentDiskUsageDesc: Storage space used by database files and related data
database.enableAutoRotationDesc: Automatically trigger cleanup when database disk usage exceeds the threshold
database.rotationThresholdDesc: Auto cleanup starts when database disk usage reaches this percentage
database.manualClearNote: The modes below remove all sessions and security analysis data. Use Precise Cleanup below if recent data must be preserved.
database.clearSessionsDesc: Delete email session records within specified time range
database.confirmClearDesc: You are about to run "{{mode}}". This cannot be undone and will permanently remove all session and security analysis data.
database.factoryResetDesc: Delete all data and restore to initial state (irreversible!)
database.modeSafeDesc: Clears all sessions and security analysis data, then runs space reclamation. Slower, but disk recovery is more complete.
database.modeQuickDesc: Clears all sessions and security analysis data without space reclamation. Faster, but disk space may be released later.
database.modeHighPerfDesc: Kept only for older clients. The server now executes it as Fast Wipe.

deployment.mtaDesc: Act as SMTP relay proxy with real-time blocking and quarantine of malicious emails

threatIntel.fallbackAllDownDesc: Use only local IOC when all external sources are unavailable
